title: Cusco, CU — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Cusco is a city in CU with a population of 500,000. The historic capital of the Inca Empire, a UNESCO World Heritage city and gateway to Machu Picchu.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
